Sender: Egyptian Antiquities Service, General Directorate (Illegible signature)
Brief_Summary: This document from the Egyptian Antiquities Service's General Directorate details financial expenditures and remaining balances for projects related to Ramose, Abydos, and Deir el-Bahari as of November 1, 1927.
English_Translation:
Egyptian Antiquities Service
Tofia Office
No. 1623
1-11-27

ANTIQUITIES SERVICE
GENERAL DIRECTORATE
No. 4-7/65
(Fragmented printed text: ointes, Monsie, Sept, vous, dis, tra, du, en, de, di)
(Illegible signature)

200 L.Eg :
(Short underline)

Ramose:
expenses as of 1/11/27 (368.24)
Abydos remaining 340 L.Eg [Pencil note: x 100/440]
Deir el-Bahari remaining 30.- : [Pencil note: x]
Ramose remaining 328,100 [Pencil note: x]
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
224
Ramose 400
depen 248.60
1-XI-27 Ramose: 151.555
Confidence_Notes: The stamp and signature are illegible. Several lines of printed text are fragmented and incomplete. 'Tofia Office' is a direct transliteration of 'مكتب توفيا'.
